title: Smart TPA
description: SmartTPA: Empowering Players with Seamless Teleportation Requests in Minecraft
body:
# SmartTPA: Empowering Players with Seamless Teleportation Requests in Minecraft


## Introduction:
Experience a new level of convenience and collaboration in your Minecraft world with SmartTPA, a groundbreaking datapack designed to enhance your multiplayer gameplay. Say goodbye to the hassle of constantly requesting teleportation from server operators - SmartTPA puts the power in your hands. Whether you're exploring vast landscapes, embarking on epic quests, or simply connecting with friends, SmartTPA enables you to send teleport requests directly to other players without requiring OP permissions. Get ready to revolutionize your Minecraft experience, one teleport at a time!


## How to use:
-to load the datapack

```
/reload
```

-to check players' id

```
simply press tab
```

-to send a teleport request to others

```
/trigger tpa set [id]
```

-to send a teleport here request to others

```
/trigger tpahere set [id]
```

-to accept the teleport request from other

```
/trigger tpaccept
```

-to deny the teleport request from other

```
/trigger tpdeny
```

-to cancel the sent request

```
/trigger tpacancel
```
